  if n <= 1
    false
  elsif n <= 3
    true
  elsif n % 2 == 0 || n % 3 == 0
    false
  else

        false
      else
        i += 6
    end
    true
  end

fn solve(nums: Array(Int64)) : Int64
  total_operations = 0 : Int64
  n = nums.length

  for i in 0..<n
    original_value = nums[i]
    operations = 0 : Int64

      # Even index: Must be Prime

        # Find the smallest non-prime >= originalValue + 1
        current = original_value + 1
        while is_prime(current)
          current += 1
        end
        operations = current - original_value
      end
    end

    total_operations += operations
  end

  total_operations
end

def solve(nums : Array(Int64)) : Int64
  var total_operations : Int64 = 0

        while is_prime(current)
